summary: W-9 Viewing functionality is working correctly. The W-9 Viewer Modal opens properly when clicking the View (Eye icon) button, displays the PDF in an iframe using blob URL, and has functional Close/Download buttons.

details: Admin code 4399 successfully logs in as Matthew Guzman
Redirects to /admin dashboard correctly
Section expands correctly showing 8 employees
Eye icon (View W-9) visible for employees with approved W-9s
Download icon visible for employees with W-9s
View W-9 button (Eye icon) found with data-testid='view-w9-7f7731bf-a24e-475f-8353-c1069a7c6fd8'
Button is clickable and opens W-9 Viewer Modal
Modal opens with header showing 'Lisa Martinez's W-9 Form'
Shows filename 'test_w9.pdf' and upload date
Shows 'Approved' badge for approved W-9s
PDF loads as blob URL in iframe (blob:https://inventory-hub-888...)
Close button in footer works correctly
X button in header works correctly
Download button present and clickable
Also tested James Wilson's W-9 - modal opened correctly
Modal shows 'James Wilson's W-9 Form' with filename 'test_w9_employee.pdf'
W-9 Review section expandable and working
Shows 'No W-9s pending review' when no pending reviews

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: W-9 Viewing functionality reported as unreliable
details: W-9 Viewer Modal opens correctly without forcing download
PDF displays in iframe using blob URL
No 'do nothing' behavior observed
All buttons (Close, Download, X) functional
Tested for multiple employees: Lisa Martinez and James Wilson

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warnings in console about <tr> and <span> elements - not affecting functionality but should be addressed
context_for_next_testing_agent: W-9 Viewing functionality verified working on Feb 23, 2026. The handleViewW9 function fetches PDF as blob and displays in iframe. Modal has Close button in footer, X button in header, and Download button. Tested with Lisa Martinez (approved W-9, test_w9.pdf) and James Wilson (approved W-9, test_w9_employee.pdf). W-9 Review section shows no pending reviews currently.
